effect.reserved_for: campaign headline 40% tint, Light Blue callout 70% tint, Golden Sand callout 30% tint, wave top layer 70% transparency
effect.subject: tint values

quotes: No other ad-hoc tints — use palette values or these specified tints only.
Campaign headline "D" and "M": **≈40% tint** of the headline color (Gold or Brand Blue colorway).
No other ad-hoc tints — use palette values or these specified tints only.

rules.intent: Prevent arbitrary tint values and preserve palette consistency.
rules.rule_text: Tints are restricted to the specified set: campaign headline "D" and "M" use a ≈40% tint of the headline color (opacity.headline.letter_tint_40 = 0.4, Gold #ffc60a or Brand Blue #00529b colorway); the Light Blue callout box uses a 70% tint (opacity.callout.light_blue_70 = 0.7); the Golden Sand callout box uses a 30% tint (opacity.callout.golden_sand_30 = 0.3); wave top layers use 70% transparency (wave.top_layer.opacity = 0.7). No other ad-hoc tints are permitted — use palette values or these specified tints only.
